question: _________ is a family of products from F5 Networks that deliver security, performance, and availability for enterprise applications.
The BIG-IP component that helps with load balancing and traffic management is called _________.
_________ is the BIG-IP component that protects applications against Layer 7 attacks.
User access via policies is managed and secured by the BIG-IP component known as _________.
To ensure optimal user experience by managing traffic across data centers, BIG-IP uses the _________ component.
BIG-IP operates as a _________ system, meaning it creates separate connections between the client and the server.
_________ is a load balancing technique that sends traffic to the server with the fewest active connections.
When BIG-IP acts as an intermediary between the client and backend servers, handling requests and distributing them, it is performing the role of a _________.
A _________ acts on behalf of internal users, masking their IP addresses and applying policies to outgoing traffic.
For SSL Offloading, BIG-IP decrypts incoming SSL traffic and forwards it as _________ to the backend servers.
The first step in activating a BIG-IP license is to generate a _________ from the system.
The _________ provisioning level in BIG-IP allocates only what’s needed and dynamically increases resources as required.
BIG-IP operates across layers 2 to 7 of the _________ Model.
To logically segment a physical network and isolate traffic, BIG-IP uses _________.
The _________ protocol resolves IP addresses to MAC addresses for Layer 2 communication.
The technology used to translate private IP addresses to public IP addresses and vice versa is known as _________.
The component responsible for handling all traffic that passes through the BIG-IP system, bypassing the general-purpose Linux kernel for higher performance, is the _________.
The operating system that controls how traffic is managed through various modules in BIG-IP is known as _________.
A _________ in F5 BIG-IP is an IP address and port combination that acts as an entry point for client requests.
To ensure that clients are consistently routed to the same server throughout their session, BIG-IP uses _________.
